scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend & npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/shared/dist packages/codebase-search/dist packages/backend/dist packages/frontend/dist && find packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -delete
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=@mastermind/codebase-search && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend
